name: Chicken & Stuffing Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Prepare the stuffing mix according to package directions. Add the chopped carrots, onions, and celery, as well as the seasoning packet.
3. In a bowl, combine the mushroom soup, milk, and parsley.
4. Spread the stuffing evenly across the center of a 3-quart baking dish.
5. Spoon small amounts of the soup mixture on either side of the stuffing in the dish.
6. Place the chicken breasts over the soup mixture, overlapping if necessary.
7. Sprinkle with paprika.
8. Cover with foil and bake for 15 minutes.
9. Remove the foil and continue to bake for another 10-15 minutes, or until heated through.
10. Stir the sauce before serving.
